rationale: Mechanical automated SDK version bump from 1.22.1 to 1.23.0. `pyproject.toml` switches the `openhands-sdk==1.22.1` / `openhands-tools==1.22.1` exact pins to `==1.23.0` (mirrored in `dev_config/python/.pre-commit-config.yaml` mypy additional_dependencies). `poetry.lock`, `enterprise/poetry.lock`, and `uv.lock` all gain `version = '1.23.0'` blocks for `openhands-agent-server`, `openhands-sdk`, and `openhands-tools` with updated sha256 integrity hashes for both wheel and sdist files (`openhands_sdk-1.23.0-py3-none-any.whl` sha256:50a1b47..., `openhands_tools-1.23.0` sha256:5923d11..., `openhands_agent_server-1.23.0` sha256:3dcb057...). `openhands/app_server/sandbox/sandbox_spec_service.py` updates `AGENT_SERVER_IMAGE = 'ghcr.io/openhands/agent-server:1.22.1-python'` to `1.23.0-python`. Standard `all-hands-bot` automated bump PR, no logic changes.
